title: My life in Christ begins with my forgiveness.
declaration: My life in Christ begins with my forgiveness.

title: I have forgiveness through Jesus' blood.
declaration: I have forgiveness through Jesus' blood.

title: God is always ready to forgive me.
declaration: God is always ready to forgive me.

title: I should always be ready to forgive.
declaration: I should always be ready to forgive.

title: I choose not to judge others, but forgive.
declaration: I choose not to judge others, but forgive.

title: Loving one another means forgiving.
declaration: Loving one another means forgiving.

title: My forgiveness means I must forgive others.
declaration: My forgiveness means I must forgive others.

title: I am reconciled to God through Jesus Christ.
declaration: I am reconciled to God through Jesus Christ.

title: I am reconciled to God through the cross.
declaration: I am reconciled to God through the cross.

title: I am reconciled through the blood of Jesus.
declaration: I am reconciled through the blood of Jesus.

title: Jesus offers universal reconciliation and holiness.
declaration: Jesus offers universal reconciliation and holiness.

title: I need to be reconciled to one another.
declaration: I need to be reconciled to one another.

title: Reconciliation leads to living as a Godly community.
declaration: Reconciliation leads to living as a Godly community.

title: I bring the message of reconciliation to the world.
declaration: I bring the message of reconciliation to the world.

title: Submission requires my humility.
declaration: Submission requires my humility.

title: Submission to God's word leads me to purity.
declaration: Submission to God's word leads me to purity.

title: I choose to submit to God and have intimacy with God.
declaration: I choose to submit to God and have intimacy with God.

title: Submission to God is spiritual warfare I need to learn to fight.
declaration: Submission to God is spiritual warfare I need to learn to fight.

title: My submission to human authority is based on the Word of God.
declaration: My submission to human authority is based on the Word of God.

title: My submission is not just about external obedience.
declaration: My submission is not just about external obedience.

title: Jesus submitted to the will of the Father, and so will I.
declaration: Jesus submitted to the will of the Father, and so will I.

title: My love of Jesus leads me to keeping his commands.
declaration: My love of Jesus leads me to keeping his commands.

title: My obedience displays my love of God and others.
declaration: My obedience displays my love of God and others.

title: I choose to obey our church leaders with joy and pray for them.
declaration: I choose to obey our church leaders with joy and pray for them.

title: My obedience is not the basis for salvation it is the result.
declaration: My obedience is not the basis for salvation it is the result.

title: God desires obedience from my heart.
declaration: God desires obedience from my heart.

title: Obedience flows from my faith in God.
declaration: Obedience flows from my faith in God.

title: Obedience follows God rather than my desires.
declaration: Obedience follows God rather than my desires.

title: Jesus entered into Jerusalem with meekness.
declaration: Jesus entered into Jerusalem with meekness.

title: Jesus' house, the church, I, need to be the house of prayer.
declaration: Jesus' house, the church, I, need to be the house of prayer.

title: Thank you Jesus for your guidance and warning to prepare us.
declaration: Thank you Jesus for your guidance and warning to prepare us.

title: I need to be ready to meet Jesus.
declaration: I need to be ready to meet Jesus.

title: I personally receive the sacrifice of Jesus into my life.
declaration: I personally receive the sacrifice of Jesus into my life.

title: By the death of Jesus, I am able to come to God the Father directly.
declaration: By the death of Jesus, I am able to come to God the Father directly.

title: Nothing could stop the resurrection of Jesus.
declaration: Nothing could stop the resurrection of Jesus.

theme: Understanding the heart of God for the lost souls
title: Jesus is risen! Now I am sent by Jesus to go and share the gospel!
declaration: Jesus is risen! Now I am sent by Jesus to go and share the gospel!

theme: Understanding the heart of God for the lost souls
title: Resurrection of Jesus brought salvation from my sin and death.
declaration: Resurrection of Jesus brought salvation from my sin and death.

theme: Understanding the heart of God for the lost souls
title: Thank you Jesus for dying for us all while we were yet sinners.
declaration: Thank you Jesus for dying for us all while we were yet sinners.

theme: Understanding the heart of God for the lost souls
title: The Father's sacrifice to send His only Son Jesus was for me and for everyone.
declaration: The Father's sacrifice to send His only Son Jesus was for me and for everyone.

theme: Understanding the heart of God for the lost souls
title: The Father's desire is for more souls to come to salvation through Jesus Christ.
declaration: The Father's desire is for more souls to come to salvation through Jesus Christ.

theme: Understanding the heart of God for the lost souls
title: The compassion of Jesus gives chance to every one for salvation.
declaration: The compassion of Jesus gives chance to every one for salvation.

theme: Understanding the heart of God for the lost souls
title: The repentance of sinners brings joy in heaven!
declaration: The repentance of sinners brings joy in heaven!

theme: The great commission to share the gospel with others
title: I am chosen by God to bear fruit and that the fruit should remain.
declaration: I am chosen by God to bear fruit and that the fruit should remain.

theme: The great commission to share the gospel with others
title: Help me Lord to sanctify you in my heart, and be ready to give an answer of my hope to every one that asks me.
declaration: Help me Lord to sanctify you in my heart, and be ready to give an answer of my hope to every one that asks me.

theme: The great commission to share the gospel with others
title: I'll let my light shine that Jesus gave me and let others come to know you.
declaration: I'll let my light shine that Jesus gave me and let others come to know you.

theme: The great commission to share the gospel with others
title: I'm not ashamed of the gospel of God because their eternity life depends on it.
declaration: I'm not ashamed of the gospel of God because their eternity life depends on it.

theme: The great commission to share the gospel with others
title: I can share the salvation message with others.
declaration: I can share the salvation message with others.

theme: The great commission to share the gospel with others
title: No one can come to Jesus unless the Father draws them.
declaration: No one can come to Jesus unless the Father draws them.

theme: The great commission to share the gospel with others
title: I just need to share my experience with Jesus and the gospel with simplicity.
declaration: I just need to share my experience with Jesus and the gospel with simplicity.

theme: Preparation of my heart for outreach
title: Lord, I am willing to be a laborer to win souls in your harvest.
declaration: Lord, I am willing to be a laborer to win souls in your harvest.

theme: Preparation of my heart for outreach
title: I can share my own experience with Jesus and invite people to come and see Jesus for themselves.
declaration: I can share my own experience with Jesus and invite people to come and see Jesus for themselves.

theme: Preparation of my heart for outreach
title: Send me as a reaper in the harvest of souls.
declaration: Send me as a reaper in the harvest of souls.

theme: Preparation of my heart for outreach
title: Let my family and friends hear the word of Jesus themselves!
declaration: Let my family and friends hear the word of Jesus themselves!

theme: Preparation of my heart for outreach
title: I have been given the ministry of reconciliation of souls to Christ.
declaration: I have been given the ministry of reconciliation of souls to Christ.

theme: Preparation of my heart for outreach
title: Lord, I understand your commission. Help me to put my faith into action!
declaration: Lord, I understand your commission. Help me to put my faith into action!

theme: Preparation of my heart for outreach
title: Let the light of the glorious gospel of Christ shine unto the people around me!
declaration: Let the light of the glorious gospel of Christ shine unto the people around me!

theme: Let the Holy Spirit lead us to share the gospel and the love of Jesus
title: Fill me with the Holy Ghost to receive power to witness.
declaration: Fill me with the Holy Ghost to receive power to witness.

theme: Let the Holy Spirit lead us to share the gospel and the love of Jesus
title: Grant unto me your servant the boldness to speak your word!
declaration: Grant unto me your servant the boldness to speak your word!

theme: Let the Holy Spirit lead us to share the gospel and the love of Jesus
title: Help me to open my mouth boldly by the Holy Spirit.
declaration: Help me to open my mouth boldly by the Holy Spirit.

theme: Let the Holy Spirit lead us to share the gospel and the love of Jesus
title: Holy Spirit, lead me, to go and speak without doubting.
declaration: Holy Spirit, lead me, to go and speak without doubting.

theme: Let the Holy Spirit lead us to share the gospel and the love of Jesus
title: Let the love of God be our witness to the world!
declaration: Let the love of God be our witness to the world!

title: I have been transformed by the renewing of my mind.
declaration: I have been transformed by the renewing of my mind. And I will continue on to seek the Lord!
